name_en: [Size Change Chip Version] Model: M12109 Small This style is double-sided and highly versatile. A legendary Neverfull BB bag that always meets your tote needs. Spacious yet not bulky, structured yet soft, perfect for home or travel. Tighten the side drawstrings to instantly transform into a chic city bag. Loosen them to revert to a stylish and practical tote. The long leather handle is suitable for shoulder or arm carry. Shown here in Damier Azur canvas. Dimensions: 24x19x9cm
